sections.title: Open Incidents
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Bug AND priority in (Highest, High) AND status != Done

powers.label: RCA
powers.prompt: Perform root cause analysis for incident {key} "{summary}". Include timeline, impact, and prevention measures.

powers.label: Runbook
powers.prompt: Create a runbook for handling {key} "{summary}". Include diagnosis steps, resolution, and rollback procedures.

sections.title: Recent Releases
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Story AND status = Done AND updated >= -7d

powers.label: Release Notes
powers.prompt: Generate release notes for recent {prefix} deployments. Include changes, fixes, and known issues.

powers.label: Rollback Plan
powers.prompt: Create a rollback plan for the latest {prefix} release. Include steps, verification, and communication.

sections.title: System Health
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND sprint in openSprints() AND type = Task

powers.label: Health Check
powers.prompt: Generate a system health report for {prefix}. Check deployments, error rates, and infrastructure status.
